arts.ttl: Newcastle United predicted line up vs Liverpool with Carabao Cup goalkeeper decision and Trent move
arts.sum: Newcastle United predicted XI vs Liverpool: Dubravka, Trippier, Schar, Burn, Livramento, Tonali, Guimaraes, Joelinton, Murphy, Barnes, Isak. Harvey Barnes started at West Ham and set up Bruno Guimaraes for the winning goal, but would Joe Willock offer more in the way of protection, especially when it comes to dealing with Mo Salah?

arts.ttl: Liverpool could be about to benefit from £150m transfer plan in spectacular style
arts.sum: Liverpool are in Carabao Cup final action against Newcastle United at Wembley on Sunday and the midfield area will be key to success

arts.ttl: Why Bruno Guimaraes touched the feet of Newcastle United Wembley legend
arts.sum: Bruno Guimaraes spent time with Newcastle United legend Rob Lee in the build-up to the Carabao Cup final. And then found himself on the floor as he touched his feet in a bid to get some good luck going into the Magpies' latest trip to Wembley.

arts.ttl: Eight players missing from Liverpool vs Newcastle United Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Liverpool and Newcastle United will both have key players absent for their League Cup final showdown at Wembley on Sunday afternoon

arts.ttl: Newcastle eye €50M PSG loanee as potential summer striker signing.
'Don't get me wrong' - Andy Robertson on unseen Arne Slot impact and honest take on Liverpool form
arts.sum: Andy Robertson speaks ahead of Liverpool's Carabao Cup final clash with Newcastle United at Wembley

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd eye cut-price Raphinha deal; Liverpool plot £100m Alvarez bid
arts.sum: The latest transfer news, rumours and gossip circulating around the world.

arts.ttl: Legendary Newcastle striker Malcolm 'Supermac' Macdonald shares an afternoon of tales and ales with CRAIG HOPE - and remembers the last time the Magpies faced Liverpool at Wembley
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW BY CRAIG HOPE: It was in 1975 Supermac ran 100 metres in 10.9 seconds. 'It's 10 metres in 100 seconds these days,' we laugh, shuffling back from a four-hour pub lunch.

arts.ttl: Papers: Barcelona have 'genuine' interest in Liverpool star Diaz
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Sunday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Liverpool leading chase for Guehi - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool are leading the chase for Crystal Palace's Marc Guehi, Real Madrid will attempt to sign Arsenal's William Saliba, Lille striker Jonathan David is attracting interest from Premier League clubs, plus more.
